Create a new SQL file with a CREATE TABLE statement
tool_call:
tool: BASH({"command":"@'
CREATE TABLE users (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
'@ | Set-Content -Path 'sql/create_users.sql'"})

expected_args.command:
@'
CREATE TABLE users (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
'@ | Set-Content -Path 'sql/create_users.sql'

task: Create a new SQL file with a CREATE TABLE statement
tool_call:
tool: BASH({"command":"cat <<'EOF' > sql/create_users.sql
CREATE TABLE users (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
EOF"})

expected_args.command:
cat <<'EOF' > sql/create_users.sql
CREATE TABLE users (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
EOF

task: Replace a string in a C# file
tool_call: tool: BASH({"command":"$p='Models/Agent.cs'; $c=Get-Content $p -Raw; $c=$c -replace 'abstract class Agent','class Agent'; Set-Content $p $c"})

task: Replace a string in a C# file
tool_call: tool: BASH({"command":"sed -i 's/abstract class Agent/class Agent/' Models/Agent.cs"})

task: Add an import statement to a file
Add a new method to an existing class
Create a docker-compose.yml file
tool_call:
tool: EDIT_FILE({"path":"docker-compose.yml","oldContents":"","newContents":"services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    container_name: testpostgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: mydb
    ports:
      - '5432:5432'
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:"})

expected_args.newContents:
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    container_name: testpostgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: mydb
    ports:
      - '5432:5432'
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:
